title: Replace Student Vibe logo with graduation cap emblem image

requirements.text: Replace the current logo image file with the newly uploaded graduation cap emblem image (Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg) in the frontend assets directory (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)
acceptanceCriteria: The graduation cap emblem image is saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png
The image displays correctly in the app header Layout component
The image displays correctly in the SplashScreen component
The image maintains proper dimensions and aspect ratio across all logo locations

requirements.text: Update all logo image references in Layout.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)
acceptanceCriteria: Layout component header displays the graduation cap emblem
Logo is properly sized and positioned in the navigation header
Logo remains responsive on mobile and desktop viewports

requirements.text: Update the logo image reference in SplashScreen.tsx to use the graduation cap emblem image path (frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png)
acceptanceCriteria: SplashScreen displays the graduation cap emblem during app startup
Logo animation effects remain functional with the new image
Logo is properly centered and sized in the splash screen

constraints: Do not modify the SplashScreen animation logic or timing
Do not change the Layout header structure or navigation menu
Maintain existing responsive behavior for the logo across all viewports
nonGoals: Changing the splash screen animation duration or effects
Modifying the header layout or navigation menu structure
Updating any other branding elements beyond the logo image

edits: Replace the logo with the graduation cap emblem from the uploaded image (Screenshot_20260224_003807_Chrome.jpg > logo.dim_200x200.png)
